Title: [Feature] Patient Search - Basic Implementation
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinician, I want to search for patients by name, MRN, or DOB so that I can quickly find patient records.

**Business Value**: Core functionality for Clinical Portal. Enables clinicians to access patient information efficiently.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Search bar with autocomplete
- [ ] Search by name (fuzzy matching)
- [ ] Search by MRN (exact match)
- [ ] Search by DOB
- [ ] Display search results in list
- [ ] Click result to view patient details

## Technical Specification

**Frontend**:
- Create `PatientSearch.tsx` component
- Use React Query for API calls
- Implement debounced search (300ms)
- Material-UI Autocomplete component

**API Endpoint**:
- `GET /api/v1/patients/search?query={query}&limit=20`

**Testing**:
- [ ] Unit tests for search component
- [ ] Integration test for API
- [ ] E2E test for search flow

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Patient 360° View - Demographics Card
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinician, I want to see comprehensive patient demographics so that I have complete context for care decisions.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Display name, age, gender, DOB
- [ ] Show MRN, SSN (masked), phone, email
- [ ] Display address
- [ ] Show insurance information
- [ ] Display primary care provider
- [ ] Show preferred language

**Design**: See Figma mockup [link]

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Feature] Patient Timeline View
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinician, I want to see a chronological timeline of clinical events so that I can understand the patient's health history.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Timeline view with date markers
- [ ] Show encounters, procedures, observations
- [ ] Filter by event type
- [ ] Click event to see details
- [ ] Export timeline to PDF

**Technical**: Use Recharts for timeline visualization

**Estimation**: 5 days

Title: [Feature] Care Gap Dashboard - List View
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a care manager, I want to see all open care gaps in a list so that I can prioritize closure activities.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Display care gaps in sortable table
- [ ] Show patient name, gap type, priority, due date
- [ ] Color-code by priority (High=Red, Medium=Yellow, Low=Green)
- [ ] Filter by priority, measure, patient
- [ ] Click row to see gap details

**API**: `GET /api/v1/care-gaps?status=OPEN&sort=priority`

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Care Gap Dashboard - Statistics Cards
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a quality director, I want to see summary statistics for care gaps so that I can track overall performance.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Total open care gaps count
- [ ] Gaps closed this month
- [ ] Average closure time
- [ ] Closure rate percentage
- [ ] Trend chart (last 6 months)

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Feature] Care Gap - Bulk Actions
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a care manager, I want to perform bulk actions on care gaps so that I can manage my workload efficiently.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Select multiple gaps (checkboxes)
- [ ] Bulk assign to care manager
- [ ] Bulk close with reason
- [ ] Bulk export to Excel
- [ ] Confirmation dialog before action

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Quality Measure Viewer
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinician, I want to view HEDIS/CMS quality measure compliance for a patient so that I know which measures they meet.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Display measures by category (Diabetes, Cardiovascular, Preventive)
- [ ] Show measure status (Met, Not Met, Excluded)
- [ ] Display numerator/denominator logic
- [ ] Show supporting evidence (observations, procedures)
- [ ] Calculate measures in real-time (<5 sec)

**API**: `POST /api/v1/quality-measures/evaluate`

**Estimation**: 5 days

Title: [Feature] AI Clinical Assistant - Chat Interface
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinician, I want to ask natural language questions about patients so that I can get quick insights.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Chat interface (message input + history)
- [ ] Send message to AI assistant
- [ ] Display AI response with markdown formatting
- [ ] Show typing indicator while waiting
- [ ] Conversation history (last 50 messages)
- [ ] Clear conversation button

**API**: `POST /api/v1/ai/chat`

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Document Upload - Drag and Drop
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinician, I want to upload clinical documents for patients so that all records are centralized.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Drag-and-drop file upload
- [ ] Support PDF, JPG, PNG, TIFF (max 10MB)
- [ ] Show upload progress bar
- [ ] Display thumbnail after upload
- [ ] Link document to patient
- [ ] Add document type (Lab Result, Imaging, etc.)

**Technical**: Use AWS S3 for storage

**Estimation**: 4 days

Title: [Feature] Document OCR Processing
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinician, I want uploaded documents to be OCR'd so that I can search within document text.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Extract text from PDF/images
- [ ] Store extracted text in database
- [ ] Full-text search across documents
- [ ] Highlight search terms in document viewer

**Technical**: Use AWS Textract or Tesseract

**Estimation**: 5 days

Title: [Feature] Admin Portal - Service Dashboard
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a system admin, I want to see all service health statuses on one page so that I can quickly identify issues.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Single-page dashboard
- [ ] List all 30+ services
- [ ] Show status (UP, DOWN, DEGRADED)
- [ ] Display version number
- [ ] Show last deployment time
- [ ] Quick links to logs/metrics

**API**: `GET /api/v1/admin/services/health`

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Feature] Admin Portal - Real-Time Monitoring
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a DevOps engineer, I want to see real-time metrics for each service so that I can monitor system performance.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Display CPU usage per service
- [ ] Display memory usage (heap for Java)
- [ ] Display request rate (req/sec)
- [ ] Display error rate
- [ ] Display p95/p99 latency
- [ ] Auto-refresh every 5 seconds

**Technical**: Integrate with Prometheus

**Estimation**: 4 days

Title: [Feature] Admin Portal - Audit Log Viewer
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a compliance officer, I want to search audit logs so that I can investigate access to PHI.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Search by user, resource, action, date range
- [ ] Filter by event type, outcome
- [ ] Display results in table
- [ ] Click row to see event details
- [ ] Export to CSV/JSON
- [ ] Real-time log streaming

**API**: `GET /api/v1/audit/events?filters={...}`

**Estimation**: 4 days

Title: [Feature] Admin Portal - User Management CRUD
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a tenant admin, I want to manage users so that I can control who has access to the system.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] List all users (paginated)
- [ ] Create new user
- [ ] Edit user details
- [ ] Assign roles
- [ ] Enable/disable user
- [ ] Reset password
- [ ] View user activity log

**API**: Full CRUD on `/api/v1/admin/users`

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Admin Portal - Tenant Management
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a super admin, I want to manage tenants so that I can onboard new customers.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] List all tenants
- [ ] Create new tenant
- [ ] Edit tenant settings
- [ ] View tenant usage statistics
- [ ] Deactivate tenant
- [ ] Configure feature flags per tenant

**API**: `/api/v1/admin/tenants`

**Estimation**: 4 days

Title: [Feature] Agent Studio - Visual Agent Designer
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinical informaticist, I want to design AI agents using a visual interface so that I don't need to write code.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Form-based agent configuration
- [ ] Configure agent identity (name, avatar, role)
- [ ] Select tools (checkboxes)
- [ ] Configure guardrails
- [ ] Set LLM parameters (model, temperature, max tokens)
- [ ] Preview system prompt
- [ ] Save as draft

**Estimation**: 8 days

Title: [Feature] Agent Studio - Prompt Template Library
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a quality manager, I want to browse and use prompt templates so that I can build agents faster.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] List all templates (system + tenant)
- [ ] Search templates by keyword
- [ ] Filter by category
- [ ] Preview template
- [ ] Use template in agent
- [ ] Create custom template
- [ ] Variable substitution ({{var}})

**API**: `/api/v1/agent-builder/templates`

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Agent Studio - Interactive Testing Sandbox
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinical informaticist, I want to test my agent before publishing so that I can verify it works correctly.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Start test session
- [ ] Chat interface for testing
- [ ] View tool invocations
- [ ] See guardrail triggers
- [ ] Display performance metrics
- [ ] Save test session
- [ ] Export conversation

**API**: `/api/v1/agent-builder/test/sessions`

**Estimation**: 4 days

Title: [Feature] Agent Studio - Version Control UI
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a clinical informaticist, I want to see agent version history so that I can rollback if needed.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] List all versions
- [ ] Display version number, date, author
- [ ] View version details
- [ ] Compare two versions (diff view)
- [ ] Rollback to previous version
- [ ] Add version notes

**API**: `/api/v1/agent-builder/agents/{id}/versions`

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Developer Portal - OpenAPI Docs
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a developer, I want to see interactive API documentation so that I can integrate with HDIM APIs.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Embed Swagger UI
- [ ] Display all 30+ service APIs
- [ ] Try it out functionality
- [ ] Request/response examples
- [ ] Authentication guide
- [ ] Rate limit information

**Technical**: Generate OpenAPI specs from Spring Boot

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Developer Portal - Postman Collections
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a developer, I want Postman collections so that I can quickly test APIs.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Generate Postman collections for all APIs
- [ ] Collections for: Patient Management, Care Gaps, Quality Measures, Prior Auth, AI Agents
- [ ] Include authentication examples
- [ ] Add environment variables
- [ ] Publish to Postman workspace

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Feature] Developer Portal - Code Examples
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a developer, I want code examples so that I can see how to use the APIs.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Code examples in Python, Java, JavaScript
- [ ] Examples for: Authentication, Patient Search, Create Prior Auth, Evaluate Measures, Webhooks
- [ ] Copy-paste ready code
- [ ] Include comments explaining each step

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] Developer Portal - Sandbox Environment
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a developer, I want a sandbox environment so that I can test integrations without affecting production.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Generate sandbox API keys
- [ ] Synthetic patient data (no PHI)
- [ ] Reset data button
- [ ] Webhook testing endpoint
- [ ] Rate limits (100 req/min)

**Technical**: Separate database for sandbox

**Estimation**: 5 days

Title: [Feature] SSO Integration - OAuth 2.0
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As an organization, I want to use our existing identity provider so that users don't need separate credentials.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Support OAuth 2.0 (Okta, Azure AD, Google)
- [ ] Authorization code flow
- [ ] Token refresh
- [ ] Map user attributes (email, name, roles)
- [ ] Admin UI to configure SSO

**Estimation**: 5 days

Title: [Feature] SSO Integration - SAML 2.0
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As an enterprise customer, I want SAML SSO so that I can use our corporate identity provider.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Support SAML 2.0
- [ ] Upload IDP metadata XML
- [ ] Configure SSO endpoint URLs
- [ ] Map SAML attributes
- [ ] Test SSO flow in admin UI

**Technical**: Use Spring Security SAML

**Estimation**: 5 days

Title: [Feature] MFA - TOTP Support
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a user, I want to use an authenticator app for MFA so that my account is more secure.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Generate QR code for TOTP enrollment
- [ ] Verify TOTP code during login
- [ ] Support Google Authenticator, Authy
- [ ] Generate backup codes (10 codes)
- [ ] Allow users to disable MFA

**Technical**: Use TOTP library (RFC 6238)

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Feature] MFA - SMS Support
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a user, I want to receive MFA codes via SMS so that I can log in without an app.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Send 6-digit code via SMS (Twilio)
- [ ] Verify SMS code during login
- [ ] Code expires after 5 minutes
- [ ] Rate limit (max 5 codes per hour)

**Technical**: Integrate Twilio API

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Feature] RBAC - 13 Roles Implementation
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a system, I want to enforce role-based access control so that users only see what they're authorized for.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Define 13 roles (SUPER_ADMIN, TENANT_ADMIN, CLINICIAN, etc.)
- [ ] Define 31 permissions
- [ ] Role-Permission mapping table
- [ ] Enforce permissions at API level (@PreAuthorize)
- [ ] Enforce permissions at UI level (hide buttons)

**Technical**: Use Spring Security + custom RBAC

**Estimation**: 4 days

Title: [Feature] Session Management - Redis Storage
Body:
## Feature Description

**User Story**: As a system, I want to store sessions in Redis so that they're available across service instances.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Store JWT sessions in Redis
- [ ] 4-hour idle timeout
- [ ] Extend session on activity
- [ ] Limit to 5 concurrent sessions per user
- [ ] Revoke session endpoint

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Infrastructure] CI/CD Pipeline - Frontend
Body:

**Objective**: Set up CI/CD pipeline for all frontend applications

**Configuration**:
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] Build all frontend apps (Clinical, Admin, Agent Studio, Patient, Developer)
- [ ] Run unit tests (Vitest)
- [ ] Run E2E tests (Playwright)
- [ ] Build Docker images
- [ ] Push to ECR
- [ ] Deploy to staging (auto)
- [ ] Deploy to production (manual approval)

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Infrastructure] CI/CD Pipeline - Backend
Body:
## Infrastructure Task

**Objective**: Set up CI/CD pipeline for all backend services

**Configuration**:
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] Build all services (Gradle multi-project)
- [ ] Run unit tests (JUnit)
- [ ] Run integration tests (Testcontainers)
- [ ] Security scanning (Snyk, Trivy)
- [ ] Build Docker images
- [ ] Push to ECR
- [ ] Deploy to staging (auto)
- [ ] Deploy to production (manual approval)

**Estimation**: 4 days

Title: [Infrastructure] Monitoring Setup - Prometheus
Body:
## Infrastructure Task

**Objective**: Deploy Prometheus for metrics collection

**Configuration**:
- [ ] Deploy Prometheus on Kubernetes
- [ ] Configure service discovery
- [ ] Add all 30+ services as targets
- [ ] Configure retention (30 days)
- [ ] Set up alerts (CPU, memory, errors)

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Infrastructure] Monitoring Setup - Grafana
Body:
## Infrastructure Task

**Objective**: Deploy Grafana and create dashboards

**Configuration**:
- [ ] Deploy Grafana on Kubernetes
- [ ] Connect to Prometheus
- [ ] Create 7 dashboards (System, Services, API, Database, Cache, Kafka, Users)
- [ ] Configure alerts
- [ ] Set up dashboard snapshots

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Documentation] Clinical Portal User Guide
Body:
## Documentation Need

**Document Type**: User Guide  
**Target Audience**: Clinicians, Nurses, Care Managers

**Content Outline**:
1. Getting Started
   - Login with SSO
   - Dashboard overview
2. Patient Search
   - Search by name, MRN, DOB
   - Viewing patient details
3. Care Gap Management
   - Finding open gaps
   - Closing gaps
   - Assigning gaps
4. Quality Measures
   - Viewing patient measures
   - Understanding measure logic
5. AI Assistant
   - Asking questions
   - Understanding responses

**Assets Needed**:
- [ ] Screenshots of all features
- [ ] Video tutorials (optional)

**Estimation**: 2 days

Title: [Documentation] API Documentation - Getting Started
Body:
## Documentation Need

**Document Type**: Developer Guide  
**Target Audience**: Developers, Integration Partners

**Content Outline**:
1. Authentication
   - JWT tokens
   - SSO integration
2. API Basics
   - Base URLs
   - Request/response format
   - Error handling
   - Rate limits
3. Common Workflows
   - Search patients
   - Evaluate quality measures
   - Create prior auth
4. Webhooks
   - Registering webhooks
   - Signature validation
   - Event types

**Estimation**: 3 days

Title: [Testing] E2E Test - Patient Search Flow
Body:
## Testing Task

**Test Scenario**: Complete patient search workflow

**Steps**:
1. Login to Clinical Portal
2. Enter patient name in search
3. Verify autocomplete suggestions appear
4. Click patient from results
5. Verify patient 360° view loads
6. Verify demographics card shows correct data

**Tools**: Playwright

**Estimation**: 1 day

Title: [Testing] E2E Test - Care Gap Closure
Body:
## Testing Task

**Test Scenario**: Complete care gap closure workflow

**Steps**:
1. Login to Clinical Portal
2. Navigate to Care Gap Dashboard
3. Filter for open gaps
4. Select a gap
5. Click "Close Gap"
6. Enter closure reason
7. Verify gap status changes to CLOSED

**Tools**: Playwright

**Estimation**: 1 day

Title: [Testing] Load Test - Patient Search API
Body:
## Testing Task

**Test Scenario**: Verify patient search API can handle load

**Performance Targets**:
- 100 requests/second
- p95 latency < 200ms
- 0% error rate

**Test Configuration**:
- Duration: 10 minutes
- Ramp-up: 2 minutes

**Tools**: K6

**Estimation**: 1 day
